data.title: Demand for holistic aesthetic care increases as more research links skin issues to gut health imbalances. Laser by Aleya offers wellness education to clients in Great Neck clinic.
data.description: In Great Neck, New York, on January 30, 2026, Laser by Aleya has incorporated wellness-focused education into its consultation approach amidst emerging studies connecting skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and rosacea to gut health imbalances. Clients at the clinic now benefit from guidance on this connection to improve their skin health.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Alto, Mich. develops hydraulic line replacement tool called THE HYDRO FISH to reduce delays & downtime.
data.description: A mechanic from Alto, Michigan shared their inspiration behind inventing THE HYDRO FISH in Pittsburgh on January 30, 2026. The inventor noted the need for a more efficient method to replace blown hydraulic hoses in tight or challenging spaces. THE HYDRO FISH was created to address this issue and has proven effective in reducing delays and minimizing downtime for vital equipment. This invention is a crucial tool in enhancing productivity and streamlining operations, potentially saving industries significant time and money.

data.title: Regeneron's Eylea sales decreased by 28% to $1.08 billion in Q4 amid rising competition. Plans to build a $2 billion new factory.
data.description: Pharmaceutical company Regeneron (NASDAQ: REGN) announced Q4 adjusted earnings of $11.44 per share, a 5% decrease from the previous year, surpassing the expected $10.71 per share. Sales for the quarter were $3.88 billion, a 3% increase year-over-year, exceeding the anticipated $3.79 billion. U.S. net sales for Eylea HD and Eylea saw a 28% drop to $1.08 billion, with Eylea HD contributing $506 million and Eylea $577 million. The decrease in Eylea product sales was due to competitive pressures, market share loss to compounded bevacizumab, patient affordability issues, a shift to Eylea HD, and lower pricing. In Nov 2025, the FDA approved Eylea HD (aflibercept) Injection 8 mg.

data.title: Mastercard beats expectations with 14% organic revenue growth in 1Q, helped by government grants. Price target cut to $655.
data.description: Mastercard Inc (NYSE: MA) exceeded expectations with a 14% organic revenue growth and reported earnings of $4.76 per share, surpassing the consensus of $4.25 per share. Analyst Tien-tsin Huang maintained a Buy rating but lowered the price target from $685 to $655. The earnings beat was partly attributed to government grants. The company's organic revenue growth of around 14% exceeded guidance. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Founder sues exotic car auction executives for fabricating documents, diverting millions, and overcharging $11,515 for termination plan. Filed in New York Supreme Court.
data.description: Managers have been accused of creating a fake operating agreement, misusing millions in revenue, and charging the founder's company over $11,515 for strategizing his termination months prior. The incident took place in Stanfordville, N.Y., as reported on Jan. 30, 2026. The founder of the existing PCARMARKET was the victim of this alleged scheme.

data.title: Former Ambassador Marc Ostfield appointed as Colin Powell School Dean at CCNY. Exciting role starting January 30, 2026.
data.description: In New York on January 30, 2026, Marc Ostfield was announced as the latest Dean of the Colin Powell School for Civic and Global Leadership at The City College of New York. Ostfield, a notable executive, scholar, educator, and diplomat, has assumed the position previously held by Richard J. Henley and Susan L. Davis. This transition marks a significant change for the institution, with Ostfield bringing his diverse expertise to guide the school's direction. His appointment reflects a new chapter for the school, with high hopes for continued growth and success under his leadership.
